final_prompt.prompt:
Create an infographic explaining definitions and relationships between technical concepts (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a hand-drawn sketch aesthetic вАФ exact illustration technique and line weight are yours
Composition: must include visual connections/relationships between concepts, with diagrams and icons alongside text
Subject: must include all 7 concepts: AI / MCP / AI Agent / OpenClaw / AI Skill / иТЄй¶П / CLI
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: needs a hand-drawn paper texture вАФ exact paper grain and medium simulation are yours
Text (verbatim): must include concept labels "AI", "MCP", "AI Agent", "OpenClaw", "AI Skill", "иТЄй¶П", "CLI"
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve all 7 concept names as listed; relationships between concepts must be visually clear and easy to understand
Avoid: must avoid overly technical or dense layouts вАФ keep it accessible and beginner-friendly
